actions.text: # B01: Detailed Recap
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: ## Key Decisions and Agreements
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Consulting engagement confirmed**: Ilya Kucherenko hired as consultant for Careerspan exit strategy and sales execution, starting Oct 28, 2025
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Rate**: $10k/month
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Duration**: Guaranteed through Jan 31 (possibly extends if AI fellowship doesn't materialize)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Payment structure**: Direct payment to I Strategies LLC via business checking account, bi-weekly invoicing with net 14-15 day terms
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Contract**: Gunderson Dettmer template to be sent by Logan
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Dual-track strategy agreed**: (1) Generate case studies/proof points through pilot customers, (2) Position company for acquisition through "juicing the pipeline" and demonstrating product-market messaging fit
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Ilya explicitly referenced past experience helping companies prepare for exit by creating targeted marketing campaigns that demonstrate market response and conversion mechanics to potential acquirers
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Baseline goals established by Ilse**:
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: By Dec 31: 10+ businesses using product for at least one hire (even if free/pilot), with feedback captured
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: By Dec 31: Larger pipeline of loose commitments from companies planning to use for next hire
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: By Jan 31: At least one paying customer
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Logan agreed these are acceptable baselines to reverse-engineer from
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **First week priorities**: Ilya to conduct discovery calls with Logan (and V when available) to understand:
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: What's been tried so far ("third rails" - what doesn't work)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Current product functionality and differentiation
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Messaging vs. product reality gap
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Begin A/B testing different messaging approaches
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: ## Strategic Context
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Timing alignment is exceptional**: Ilya just finished prior engagement last week, has availability Nov-Jan window before potential AI fellowship at Constellation (Berkeley-based, AI safety/governance org). This window precisely matches Careerspan's exit preparation timeline. Ilya described consulting style as "firefighter mentality" - energized by emergencies and urgent missions with clear objectives.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Ilya's relevant expertise stack**:
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Former CRO across multiple AI-native companies (4 AI products taken to market)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Two exits under his belt (one merger, one with payout)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Specific exit motion consulting experience: helped company "juice the pipeline" to demonstrate market response to potential acquirers, which increased final sale price
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Deep AI/ML education: UC Berkeley coursework, currently writing 120-page paper on AI agent strategy
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Executive education from Stanford GSB, London School of Economics, Harvard (Advanced Business Strategy course)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Former firefighter background (shapes his approach to high-pressure engagements)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Careerspan's position**: Company is in "power saving mode" after notifying two team members about exit trajectory. In last 2 weeks, had 3 companies express interest (aqui-hire or tech asset acquisition). Logan has list of ~150 potential acquirers being researched. Primary asset is "badass product" (Logan's words) that needs sales motion to generate case studies and proof points. Secondary asset is strong founder networks for warm outreach.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: The "reverse engineering" puzzle**: Logan recognizes they're "playing to two masters":
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: 1. The end customer (businesses using product to solve hiring problems)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: 2. The potential acquirer (who needs to see specific metrics/signals to justify purchase)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Ilya's value prop here is understanding both - he knows what metrics/narratives make acquisition targets attractive, AND he knows how to execute the sales/marketing engine to generate those metrics authentically (not fake numbers, but targeted campaigns that reveal real market response).
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Philosophical alignment moments**:
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Logan: "Zero ego, willing to learn, love admitting ignorance" - contrasts with typical founder Ilya encounters
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Ilya: "I owe this much back to the company" mindset, treats revenue targets as personal obligations
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Both recognize HR/hiring is genuinely broken: "There are folks waking up Monday morning with a headache because they don't have you guys" (Ilya)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window
